<div class="col-md-3 article-toc d-none d-md-block">
= Contents =
  - [[#使用OpenBLAS加速numpy|使用OpenBLAS加速numpy]]
    - [[#使用OpenBLAS加速numpy#编译安装OpenBLAS|编译安装OpenBLAS]]
    - [[#使用OpenBLAS加速numpy#编译安装numpy|编译安装numpy]]

</div>
<div class="col-md-9 article-main">
%template article_template
= 使用OpenBLAS加速numpy =
== 编译安装OpenBLAS ==
https://github.com/xianyi/OpenBLAS
{{{
	make FC=gfortran
	make PREFIX=/opt/OpenBLAS install
	}}}
添加环境路径
{{{
export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/opt/OpenBLAS/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH
export C_INCLUDE_PATH=/opt/OpenBLAS/include:$C_INCLUDE_PATH 
export CPLUS_INCLUDE_PATH=/opt/OpenBLAS/include:$CPLUS_INCLUDE_PATH 
}}}
== 编译安装numpy ==
修改设置文件
{{{
cp site.cfg.example site.cfg

[openblas]
libraries = openblas
library_dirs = /opt/OpenBLAS/lib
include_dirs = /opt/OpenBLAS/include
...
	}}}
编译安装
{{{
python3 setup.py install --user
	}}}
